description_long: This is a large, single-family house set atop a cubic section of earth, with visible stratified soil layers beneath the surface. The house features a prominent gable roof with gray shingles and a main structure that extends into a smaller wing. The exterior walls are a light pinkish color, and the property includes a paved driveway with several parked vehicles. The surrounding yard is grassy, with a clear demarcation between the built environment and the natural ground. The house appears to have multiple windows and a main entryway with a small porch area.
description: A large, gable-roofed house with gray shingles, light pink walls, and a grassy yard, set atop a cubic earth section with visible soil layers.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, porch, and the layered earth section beneath the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway with parked vehicles and the extended wing of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, more of the roof, and the stratified earth layers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the house's wing and a partial view of the yard and driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a covered overhang.
